en: What's OpenClaw?
zh: 什么是openclaw？

en: I've been programming since I was 14.
zh: 我从 14 岁起就开始编程。

en: Building software felt like playing a video game.
zh: 构建软件就像玩电子游戏一样。

en: I couldn't stop.
zh: 我无法停下来。

en: Until I did.
zh: 直到我做到了。

en: I created a company,
zh: 我创建了一家公司，

en: I poured a decade of my life into it.
zh: 我倾注了十年的生命。

en: No venture capital,
zh: 没有风险投资，

en: every weekend.
zh: 每个周末。

en: And then I sold the dream.
zh: 然后我就卖掉了梦想。

en: And I felt absolutely nothing.
zh: 我完全没有任何感觉。

en: For three years,
zh: 三年来，

en: I was wondering,
zh: 我想知道，

en: did therapy, traveled,
zh: 做过治疗、旅行、

en: I changed countries twice.
zh: 我两次换国家。

en: Nothing, nothing clicked.
zh: 什么都没有，什么也没有点击。

en: Now I wake up every morning
zh: 现在我每天早上醒来

en: with everything I was supposed to want
zh: 拥有我想要的一切

en: and no reason.
zh: 没有理由。

en: No reason to get out of bed.
zh: 没有理由起床。

en: And then in early 2025,
zh: 然后在 2025 年初，

en: I tried an experiment.
zh: 我尝试了一个实验。

en: I wanted to see what these new AI coding agents are all about.
zh: 我想看看这些新的人工智能编码代理到底有什么用。

en: And I had what I can only describe as a "holy shit" moment.
zh: 我经历了一个我只能形容为“天哪”的时刻。

en: The boilerplate, the plumbing,
zh: 样板、管道、

en: all the boring parts that was software development,
zh: 软件开发中所有无聊的部分，

en: AI could do all of it.
zh: 人工智能可以做到这一切。

en: The bottleneck is no longer typing.
zh: 瓶颈不再是打字。

en: It's thinking.
zh: 它正在思考。

en: And thinking was the part I did [for] 25 years.
zh: 思考是我 25 年来所做的事情。

en: Building software felt like playing a video game again.
zh: 构建软件就像再次玩电子游戏一样。

en: I was back.
zh: 我回来了。

en: I built 44 projects in just a few months.
zh: 我在短短几个月内构建了 44 个项目。

en: And the latest one was a WhatsApp bot.
zh: 最新的一个是 WhatsApp 机器人。

en: I put it on my computer,
zh: 我把它放在电脑上

en: it talks through the apps that you already know.
zh: 它通过您已经知道的应用程序进行对话。

en: And then I took it on a trip to Marrakesh.
zh: 然后我带着它去马拉喀什旅行。

en: You know, just to navigate around, to find restaurants, do translations.
zh: 你知道，只是为了四处浏览、寻找餐馆、做翻译。

en: And at first, it didn't really feel right.
zh: 起初，感觉不太对劲。

en: It felt too much like a tool,
zh: 感觉太像一个工具了

en: not like a friend.
zh: 不像朋友。

en: You know, too many bullet points, too many tables.
zh: 你知道，太多的要点，太多的表格。

en: So I told it,
zh: 所以我告诉它，

en: because those modern models, they are so smart,
zh: 因为那些现代模型，它们非常聪明，

en: they know what WhatsApp is, they know how people talk.
zh: 他们知道 WhatsApp 是什么，他们知道人们如何交谈。

en: I just had to tell it.
zh: 我只是不得不告诉它。

en: And then it felt right.
zh: 然后感觉是对的。

en: And you know how you talk to friends --
zh: 你知道如何与朋友交谈——

en: at some point I was walking around and I was sending it a voice message.
zh: 在某个时刻，我正在四处走动，并向它发送语音消息。

en: And then I froze because I actually,
zh: 然后我愣住了，因为我实际上，

en: I didn't build voice in there.
zh: 我没有在那里建立声音。

en: I added support for images, yeah, but even that took hours.
zh: 我添加了对图像的支持，是的，但即使这样也花了几个小时。

en: So I was looking at the typing indicator,
zh: 所以我看着打字指示器，

en: and then the agent responded.
zh: 然后经纪人回应了。

en: And I very vividly remember this situation
zh: 我非常清楚地记得这种情况

en: where I was standing there and I was like,
zh: 我站在那里，我当时想，

en: how did you do that?
zh: 你是怎么做到的？

en: And the agent replied, I'm not kidding you,
zh: 经纪人回答说，我不是在开玩笑，

en: "The mad lad figured it out on its own."
zh: “这个疯子自己想出了办法。”

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: And then it walked me through every single step:
zh: 然后它引导我完成每一步：

en: how it got a message from me
zh: 它是如何收到我的消息的

en: but there was no file ending, so it inspected the file,
zh: 但没有文件结尾，所以它检查了文件，

en: it found that it was audio, but a weird format, so it converted it.
zh: 它发现它是音频，但格式很奇怪，所以它转换了它。

en: And then it was looking for something to translate the audio,
zh: 然后它正在寻找一些东西来翻译音频，

en: but I didn't have it installed.
zh: 但我没有安装它。

en: But then it found an OpenAI key, it sent the whole thing to the server,
zh: 但后来它发现了一个 OpenAI 密钥，它把整个东西发送到服务器，

en: it got it back, and then it replied.
zh: 它得到了它，然后它回复了。

en: All of that in nine seconds.
zh: 所有这一切都在九秒内完成。

en: Can you imagine? I didn't build any of that.
zh: 你能想象吗？我没有建造任何东西。

en: For me, this was the moment where I thought,
zh: 对我来说，这一刻我想，

en: this is something new.
zh: 这是新事物。

en: This is not a chatbot.
zh: 这不是聊天机器人。

en: Chatbots give up.
zh: 聊天机器人放弃了。

en: Agents improvise.
zh: 特工即兴发挥。

en: And, you know, I was sold.
zh: 而且，你知道，我被出卖了。

en: I wanted to share this.
zh: 我想分享这个。

en: I wanted to like, tell people on Twitter.
zh: 我想在 Twitter 上点赞、告诉人们。

en: And nobody really got it.
zh: 但没有人真正明白。

en: It's like, it's almost like you have to experience an agent.
zh: 就像，这几乎就像你必须经历一个经纪人。

en: It's kind of hard to explain.
zh: 这有点难以解释。

en: It took me a few weeks.
zh: 我花了几个星期的时间。

en: And then I did something stupid.
zh: 然后我做了一件蠢事。

en: And remember, this agent, by default,
zh: 请记住，默认情况下，该代理

en: can do anything that you can do on your computer.
zh: 可以做任何你可以在电脑上做的事情。

en: So obviously I put it in a public Discord, and I invited random people.
zh: 很明显，我把它放在了公开的 Discord 中，并邀请了随机的人。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: And I was looking at it the whole night.
zh: 我整个晚上都在看着它。

en: People were talking with it,
zh: 人们正在与它交谈，

en: people were having fun with it, people tried to hack it.
zh: 人们乐在其中，人们试图破解它。

en: And when my eyes were like, falling off almost,
zh: 当我的眼睛几乎要掉下来的时候，

en: I exited the process, and I went to bed.
zh: 我退出了这个过程，然后就去睡觉了。

en: Though I forgot -- I built a system to be resilient.
zh: 尽管我忘记了——我构建了一个具有弹性的系统。

en: So while I was walking to the bedroom,
zh: 所以当我走向卧室的时候

en: the agent happily booted up again and talked to everyone in the world.
zh: 特工高兴地再次启动并与世界上的每个人交谈。

en: The next morning I woke up --
zh: 第二天早上我醒来——

en: over 800 messages.
zh: 超过 800 条消息。

en: I panicked.
zh: 我惊慌失措。

en: I pulled the plug,
zh: 我拔掉插头，

en: I read every single message
zh: 我阅读了每一条消息

en: just to see if the agent leaked my private life.
zh: 只是为了看看经纪人是否泄露了我的私生活。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: Nothing happened.
zh: 什么也没发生。

en: But it could have.
zh: 但它可能有。

en: But that was the moment where it went viral.
zh: 但就在那时，它迅速走红。

en: Today, the project is called OpenClaw.
zh: 如今，该项目被称为 OpenClaw。

en: It's pretty much the fastest-growing open-source project.
zh: 它几乎是增长最快的开源项目。

en: Its mascot is a lobster.
zh: 它的吉祥物是一只龙虾。

en: It claws into your machine.
zh: 它会侵入你的机器。

en: Jensen Huang calls it the operating system for personal AI.
zh: 黄仁勋将其称为个人人工智能操作系统。

en: But by far, my favorite quote is from a friend
zh: 但到目前为止，我最喜欢的一句话来自朋友

en: who looked at this statistic and said,
zh: 谁看了这个统计数据后说：

en: "Peter, this is not hockey-stick growth.
zh: “彼得，这不是曲棍球棒式的增长。

en: This is stripper pole."
zh: 这是脱衣舞柱。”

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: And I, I was not ready.
zh: 而我，我还没有准备好。

en: You know, when something blows up like this,
zh: 你知道，当事情发生这样的事情时

en: everything explodes.
zh: 一切都爆炸了。

en: Hundreds of messages,
zh: 数百条留言，

en: reporters calling me in the middle of the night,
zh: 记者半夜给我打电话，

en: security vulnerabilities.
zh: 安全漏洞。

en: And then
zh: 进而

en: the AI company whose model most of my users loved
zh: 我的大多数用户喜欢其模型的人工智能公司

en: sent me a trademark claim.
zh: 向我发送了一份商标声明。

en: I had to rename the whole thing while it was taking off.
zh: 当它起飞时我不得不重新命名整个东西。

en: You know, they even tried to push me away from the lobster.
zh: 你知道，他们甚至试图把我从龙虾身边推开。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: Like, I was staring at the message.
zh: 就像，我盯着这条消息。

en: It was like, it's not even the same animal.
zh: 就像，它甚至不是同一种动物。

en: And then they also cut off the model most of my users loved.
zh: 然后他们还砍掉了我的大多数用户喜欢的模型。

en: You know, first the name,
zh: 你知道，首先是名字，

en: then the lobster,
zh: 然后是龙虾，

en: then the model.
zh: 然后是模型。

en: I was that close to just deleting the whole thing.
zh: 我差点就把整个事情都删掉了。

en: But then I learned what people are building with it.
zh: 但后来我了解到人们正在用它构建什么。

en: So at ClawCon in Vienna,
zh: 所以在维也纳的 ClawCon 上，

en: because yes, we have conferences already --
zh: 因为是的，我们已经召开了会议——

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: And people wore lobster headbands,
zh: 人们戴着龙虾发带，

en: I met Stefan
zh: 我遇见了斯特凡

en: and his 60-year-old dad, Gerhard,
zh: 和他 60 岁的父亲格哈德，

en: a beer sommelier who never wrote a single line of code.
zh: 一位从未写过一行代码的啤酒侍酒师。

en: They connected OpenClaw via Bluetooth,
zh: 他们通过蓝牙连接 OpenClaw，

en: sent it one prompt,
zh: 向其发送了一个提示，

en: and the agent did the whole 90-minute brew:
zh: 代理完成了整个 90 分钟的酿造：

en: temperature ramps, hop additions, everything.
zh: 温度梯度、啤酒花添加，一切。

en: And then they were like, what are we doing with all this beer?
zh: 然后他们就想，我们用这些啤酒做什么？

en: And the agent was, "Let's make a website."
zh: 代理说：“我们做一个网站吧。”

en: So they built a website, and then they added payments,
zh: 所以他们建立了一个网站，然后添加了支付功能，

en: and now they have a real product.
zh: 现在他们有了真正的产品。

en: And almost all of it was just done via the phone.
zh: 几乎所有这一切都是通过电话完成的。

en: In China,
zh: 在中国，

en: installing OpenClaw is called raising lobsters.
zh: 安装OpenClaw就称为养龙虾。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: Thousands of people were lining up at the Tencent office in Shenzhen
zh: 腾讯深圳办公室内数千人排队

en: to get their lobster installed.
zh: 安装他们的龙虾。

en: Shenzhen even gives out subsidies for people running businesses on OpenClaw.
zh: 深圳甚至为在OpenClaw上做生意的人提供补贴。

en: Now
zh: 现在

en: if you install OpenClaw on your work machine,
zh: 如果你在工作机器上安装 OpenClaw，

en: at least with the default settings,
zh: 至少在默认设置下，

en: you might get fired.
zh: 你可能会被解雇。

en: And then I met an entrepreneur in China
zh: 然后我在中国遇到了一位企业家

en: who showed me a spreadsheet.
zh: 谁给我看了一个电子表格。

en: Every employee, every day,
zh: 每一位员工，每一天，

en: one task automated by OpenClaw.
zh: OpenClaw 自动执行一项任务。

en: If you miss too many days, you're fired.
zh: 如果你缺席太多天，你就​​会被解雇。

en: So fired for using it,
zh: 因使用它而被解雇，

en: fired for not using it.
zh: 因不使用它而被解雇。

en: After Marrakesh,
zh: 继马拉喀什之后，

en: I thought, this is incredible.
zh: 我想，这太不可思议了。

en: And it's also a little bit scary.
zh: 而且这也有点可怕。

en: How can we make it more scary?
zh: 我们怎样才能让它更可怕呢？

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: So I added a new feature, a heartbeat.
zh: 所以我添加了一个新功能，心跳。

en: You know, by default,
zh: 你知道，默认情况下，

en: the agent would only wake up when you send it a prompt.
zh: 仅当您向其发送提示时，代理才会醒来。

en: With the heartbeat,
zh: 随着心跳，

en: the agent would just wake up periodically,
zh: 代理会定期醒来，

en: check your emails,
zh: 检查你的电子邮件，

en: check your calendar, follow up on loose ends.
zh: 检查你的日历，跟进未解决的问题。

en: My initial prompt was simply "surprise me."
zh: 我最初的提示只是“给我一个惊喜”。

en: And yes, that's kind of as scary as it sounds.
zh: 是的，这听起来有点可怕。

en: So no large company would ship something like that.
zh: 所以没有大公司会运送这样的东西。

en: But I'm a random builder from Austria.
zh: 但我是一个来自奥地利的随机建造者。

en: I don't have a legal department.
zh: 我没有法律部门。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: I built this sandbox, this sandcastle, for me,
zh: 我为我建造了这个沙箱，这个沙堡，

en: and I made it open-source so other people could play with it
zh: 我将其开源，以便其他人可以使用它

en: and other people could raise their imagination.
zh: 其他人可以提高他们的想象力。

en: Imagine putting an agent into a meeting.
zh: 想象一下让一个代理参加会议。

en: Not for notes, we figured that out.
zh: 不是为了笔记，我们已经弄清楚了。

en: A bidirectional model that can listen and hear at the same time.
zh: 可以同时听和听的双向模型。

en: Somebody mentions a statistic,
zh: 有人提到一个统计数据，

en: a subagent can spin off and check it for you.
zh: 子代理可以分派并为您检查。

en: A decision is made,
zh: 做出了决定，

en: the agent can send a follow-up
zh: 代理可以发送后续信息

en: before the meeting even ends.
zh: 在会议结束之前。

en: In the future,
zh: 将来，

en: we're not just going to have one agent.
zh: 我们不会只有一名代理人。

en: You might have your work agent,
zh: 你可能有你的工作代理人，

en: your personal Claw, maybe one for health,
zh: 你个人的爪子，也许是为了健康，

en: maybe one for relationship.
zh: 也许是为了关系。

en: And they all should work together in a secure way.
zh: 他们都应该以安全的方式一起工作。

en: Because how did humanity level up?
zh: 因为人类是如何升级的？

en: By specializing and collaborating.
zh: 通过专业化和协作。

en: And agents are about to do the same.
zh: 代理商也即将做同样的事情。

en: Imagine a company, a small business
zh: 想象一家公司，一家小企业

en: that has ten agents that are all specialized,
zh: 有十个专业代理人，

en: taking over various parts of the business.
zh: 接管业务的各个部分。

en: We don't even have a name for what it might become,
zh: 我们甚至不知道它可能会变成什么样子

en: but we are about to find out.
zh: 但我们即将找到答案。

en: So I created the OpenClaw Foundation,
zh: 所以我创建了 OpenClaw 基金会，

en: a nonprofit, open-source forever.
zh: 一个非营利性的、永远开源的组织。

en: Because what OpenClaw did for many people
zh: 因为 OpenClaw 为很多人做了什么

en: was it moved AI from this scary,
zh: 它是否让人工智能不再那么可怕，

en: nebulous thing
zh: 模糊的东西

en: into something that is fun
zh: 投入到有趣的事情中

en: and useful and maybe a bit weird.
zh: 很有用，但也许有点奇怪。

en: You know, lobsters and headbands and beer businesses.
zh: 你知道，龙虾、头带和啤酒生意。

en: Because what we need in the future is more people spending more time with AI
zh: 因为未来我们需要的是更多的人花更多的时间在人工智能上

en: to better understand how powerful
zh: 为了更好地理解有多强大

en: and transformative this technology really is.
zh: 这项技术确实具有变革性。

en: In New York,
zh: 在纽约，

en: at ClawCon ...
zh: 在爪子大会上...

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: Yes, they're everywhere now.
zh: 是的，它们现在无处不在。

en: There were thousands of people that were discussing
zh: 当时有上千人在讨论

en: what the lobster did this week.
zh: 龙虾本周做了什么。

en: A retiree in Shenzhen who automated their groceries.
zh: 深圳的一位退休人员实现了食品杂货的自动化。

en: A teenager in Sao Paulo
zh: 圣保罗的一名青少年

en: who built a tutoring business on OpenClaw.
zh: 他在 OpenClaw 上建立了辅导业务。

en: Gerhard and his beer machine.
zh: 格哈德和他的啤酒机。

en: None of them are programmers.
zh: 他们都不是程序员。

en: All of them are builders.
zh: 他们都是建设者。

en: Because that's the real transformation.
zh: 因为那才是真正的转变。

en: It's not a technology.
zh: 这不是一项技术。

en: It's the access.
zh: 这就是访问权限。

en: Agents change who can build things,
zh: 特工改变了谁可以建造东西，

en: and that door is not closing again.
zh: 那扇门不会再关上。

en: Because when you can prompt a prototype into existence
zh: 因为当你可以促使原型存在时

en: in one hour,
zh: 一小时内，

en: anything is possible.
zh: 一切皆有可能。

en: The next breakthrough can come from anyone,
zh: 下一个突破可以来自任何人，

en: any country,
zh: 任何国家，

en: any cafe.
zh: 任何咖啡馆。

en: When even a burnt-out founder,
zh: 即使是一位筋疲力尽的创始人，

en: staring at the screen,
zh: 盯着屏幕，

en: wondering if his spark is gone
zh: 想知道他的火花是否消失了

en: can do something like that.
zh: 可以做类似的事情。

en: It's not gone.
zh: 它并没有消失。

en: It's just waiting.
zh: 它只是在等待。

en: The lobster is loose,
zh: 龙虾是松散的，

en: and it's not going back into the tank.
zh: 而且它不会回到水箱中。

en: Thank you very much.
zh: 非常感谢。

en: (Applause)
zh: （掌声）

en: Chris Anderson: Come here.
zh: 克里斯·安德森：过来。

en: I mean.
zh: 我是说。

en: I think I want to say something personal to you.
zh: 我想我想对你说一些私人的事情。

en: With love, but truth.
zh: 有爱，但有真理。

en: You really terrify me.
zh: 你真让我害怕。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: CA: I’m serious.
zh: CA：我是认真的。

en: If Hollywood was to ever make a movie
zh: 如果好莱坞要拍电影

en: in which humanity opened Pandora’s box,
zh: 人类打开了潘多拉魔盒，

en: and everything went crazy,
zh: 一切都变得疯狂，

en: like, you seriously could be cast as the star character.
zh: 就像，你真的可以被选为明星角色。

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: CA: Because the story we’re told
zh: CA：因为我们听到的故事

en: is that AI researchers are doing all this great stuff,
zh: 人工智能研究人员正在做所有这些伟大的事情，

en: but they're taking all these great efforts to ensure safety
zh: 但他们正在尽一切努力来确保安全

en: and make sure nothing bad could happen.
zh: 并确保不会发生任何不好的事情。

en: You take glee in seeing what might happen if you just put it out there.
zh: 如果你把它放在那里，你会很高兴看到会发生什么。

en: Like, is any part of you feeling that that's a little bit reckless?
zh: 比如，你是否觉得这有点鲁莽？

en: Peter Steinberger: I wouldn't say so.
zh: 彼得·斯坦伯格：我不会这么说。

en: I see my work as a ...
zh: 我将我的工作视为...

en: (Laughter)
zh: （笑声）

en: PS: I see it as a window into the future.
zh: PS：我认为这是通向未来的窗口。

en: Like, in the very beginning, there were all these scary moments.
zh: 就像一开始，就有所有这些可怕的时刻。

en: Now we have proper security layers.
zh: 现在我们有了适当的安全层。

en: You can have your sandbox,
zh: 你可以拥有你的沙箱，

en: you can put your lobster into a very small, tiny box
zh: 你可以把龙虾放进一个非常小的盒子里

en: and really control what it can do.
zh: 并真正控制它能做什么。

en: There are still some issues that we need to figure out,
zh: 还有一些问题需要我们弄清楚

en: but the fact that so many people want this now
zh: 但事实上现在很多人都想要这个

en: will help to figure this out much faster.
zh: 将有助于更快地解决这个问题。

en: CA: So I'm glad you mentioned the security layers.
zh: CA：所以我很高兴您提到安全层。

en: I mean, you're making a huge bet on human ingenuity using this.
zh: 我的意思是，你正在利用这个对人类的聪明才智下一个巨大的赌注。

en: This is an incredible tool that suddenly can maximize the power
zh: 这是一个令人难以置信的工具，可以突然将力量最大化

en: of what any human can do.
zh: 任何人都可以做的事情。

en: How many people in your community
zh: 您的社区有多少人

en: are taking the safety issue seriously
zh: 正在认真对待安全问题

en: and want to use OpenClaw, for example, to find smarter ways?
zh: 例如，想要使用 OpenClaw 来寻找更智能的方法？

en: Just checking whether anything might be going wrong
zh: 只是检查是否有任何问题

en: and giving an early alarm to someone or something like that?
zh: 并向某人或类似的事物发出早期警报？

en: PS: Most people are not as reckless [as] --
zh: PS：大多数人并不那么鲁莽——

en: number one, putting it into a public Discord --
zh: 第一，将其置于公开的不和谐之中——

en: strongly don't recommend.
zh: 强烈不推荐。

en: Number two, I think I single-handedly increased
zh: 第二，我想我一手增加了

en: Mac mini sales by multiple percent.
zh: Mac mini 销量增长数倍。

en: So most people give it their own little Mac mini.
zh: 所以大多数人都会给它自己的小 Mac mini。

en: Mine's a little princess.
zh: 我家是个小公主。

en: Mine got a Mac studio.
zh: 我的有一个 Mac 工作室。

en: It calls it “The Castle.”
zh: 它称之为“城堡”。

en: And that greatly reduces the actual risk
zh: 这大大降低了实际风险

en: because you can only access what's on that computer.
zh: 因为您只能访问该计算机上的内容。

en: And maybe all your pictures are not there.
zh: 也许你所有的照片都不在那里。

en: CA: Well, definitely, if humanity goes down,
zh: CA：嗯，当然，如果人类堕落了，

en: I'll be very grateful for at least the rise in Mac mini sales
zh: 至少我会非常感激 Mac mini 销量的增长

en: for a period of time.
zh: 在一段时间内。

en: You are amazing.
zh: 你太棒了。

en: You are amazing,
zh: 你太棒了，

en: and I think you're actually right at the cutting edge
zh: 我认为你实际上处于最前沿

en: of whether AI is going to be the biggest boon ever
zh: 人工智能是否会成为有史以来最大的福音

en: or possibly a serious problem.
zh: 或者可能是一个严重的问题。

en: And, you know, I hope you continue conversations with people here
zh: 而且，你知道，我希望你继续与这里的人对话

en: and just help us get smarter on how to do this the right way
zh: 帮助我们更聪明地了解如何以正确的方式做到这一点

en: because it is absolutely incredible what you've built.
zh: 因为你所建造的东西绝对令人难以置信。

en: Thank you for sharing so honestly.
zh: 感谢您如此诚实地分享。

en: PS: Thank you so much.
zh: PS：非常感谢。

en: (Applause)
zh: （掌声）
